# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production
      custom_args:
        description: 'Custom arguments for build/deploy'
        required: false
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 60
    
    outputs:
      build_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      artifact_path: ${{ steps.build.outputs.artifact }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      
      - name: Set build version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-${GITHUB_SHA::8}
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Build version: $VERSION"
      
      - name: Setup build environment
        run: |
          if [ -f ".build-env" ]; then
            source .build-env
          fi
          env | sort
      
      - name: Execute pre-build script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/pre-build.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/pre-build.sh
          .github/scripts/pre-build.sh
      
      - name: Run custom build script
        id: build
        env:
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          CUSTOM_ARGS: ${{ github.event.inputs.custom_args }}
          BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "build.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x build.sh
            ./build.sh
          elif [ -f ".github/scripts/build.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x .github/scripts/build.sh
            .github/scripts/build.sh
          else
            echo "No build script found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            ARTIFACT_PATH="dist"
          elif [ -d "build" ]; then
            ARTIFACT_PATH="build"
          else
            ARTIFACT_PATH="."
          fi
          echo "artifact=$ARTIFACT_PATH" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      
      - name: Execute post-build script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/post-build.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/post-build.sh
          .github/scripts/post-build.sh
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: ${{ steps.build.outputs.artifact }}
          retention-days: 30

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: build
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 30
    if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/test.sh') != '' || hashFiles('test.sh') != ''
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Execute test script
        env:
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "test.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x test.sh
            ./test.sh
          elif [ -f ".github/scripts/test.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x .github/scripts/test.sh
            .github/scripts/test.sh
          fi

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: [build, test]
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 45
    if: |
      (github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop') ||
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'staging')
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Execute pre-deploy script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/pre-deploy.sh') != ''
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/pre-deploy.sh
          .github/scripts/pre-deploy.sh
      
      - name: Run deployment script
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          CUSTOM_ARGS: ${{ github.event.inputs.custom_args }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x deploy.sh
            ./deploy.sh staging
          elif [ -f ".github/scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x .github/scripts/deploy.sh
            .github/scripts/deploy.sh staging
          else
            echo "No deployment script found"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Execute post-deploy script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/post-deploy.sh') != ''
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/post-deploy.sh
          .github/scripts/post-deploy.sh
      
      - name: Health check
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/healthcheck.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/healthcheck.sh
          .github/scripts/healthcheck.sh staging

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    needs: [build, test]
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 60
    if: |
      (github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') ||
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'production')
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Execute pre-deploy script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/pre-deploy.sh') != ''
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/pre-deploy.sh
          .github/scripts/pre-deploy.sh
      
      - name: Backup current deployment
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/backup.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/backup.sh
          .github/scripts/backup.sh
      
      - name: Run deployment script
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          CUSTOM_ARGS: ${{ github.event.inputs.custom_args }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x deploy.sh
            ./deploy.sh production
          elif [ -f ".github/scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x .github/scripts/deploy.sh
            .github/scripts/deploy.sh production
          else
            echo "No deployment script found"
            exit 1
          fi
      
      - name: Execute post-deploy script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/post-deploy.sh') != ''
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/post-deploy.sh
          .github/scripts/post-deploy.sh
      
      - name: Health check
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/healthcheck.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/healthcheck.sh
          .github/scripts/healthcheck.sh production
      
      - name: Notify deployment
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ -f ".github/scripts/notify.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x .github/scripts/notify.sh
            .github/scripts/notify.sh "${{ job.status }}" "production" "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          fi

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup
    needs: [deploy-staging, deploy-production]
    runs-on: self-hosted
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Execute cleanup script
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/cleanup.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/cleanup.sh
          .github/scripts/cleanup.sh
